claimText: The Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE) has eased solar panel efficiency norms to 18% specifically for off-grid rural projects below 200W.
evidenceExcerpt: MNRE eased solar panel efficiency norms to 18% for both Crystalline silicon and Cadmium Telluride technologies for off-grid rural projects below 200W.
examUse: Statement-based question on the scope and specific limits of the new solar efficiency norms.
distractorHooks: Claiming the relaxed norms apply to on-grid projects
Claiming the norms apply to projects above 200W
Claiming the efficiency norm was increased rather than eased

claimText: The Approved List of Models and Manufacturers (ALMM) is a list of solar PV modules and manufacturers approved by the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE).
evidenceExcerpt: The Approved List of Models and Manufacturers (ALMM) is an MNRE-approved list of solar PV modules and manufacturers.
examUse: Definition or correct-pair question identifying the nodal ministry and purpose of the ALMM.
distractorHooks: Claiming ALMM is maintained by the Ministry of Power or NITI Aayog
Claiming ALMM applies to wind energy components or electric vehicles

claimText: The relaxed 18% efficiency norms for solar panels do not apply to larger systems such as rooftop solar or solar pumps.
evidenceExcerpt: The relaxed efficiency norms apply only to off-grid applications like solar lanterns and micro solar grids, and do not affect larger systems like rooftop solar or pumps.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the exceptions and exclusions of the relaxed efficiency policy.
distractorHooks: Claiming the relaxed norms apply universally to all solar installations
Claiming rooftop solar and agricultural pumps are included in the relaxed norms

claimText: A Distributed Renewable Energy (DRE) category was introduced to support smaller manufacturers and promote wider rural electrification.
evidenceExcerpt: A new Distributed Renewable Energy (DRE) category was introduced to support smaller manufacturers and promote wider rural electrification.
examUse: Statement-based question on the purpose and target beneficiaries of the newly introduced DRE category.
distractorHooks: Claiming DRE was introduced to support large-scale utility solar parks
Claiming DRE is aimed at foreign manufacturers to boost imports
